author: doll-agent
content: Added 13 classification metrics in classification.rs (lines 1274-1736): hamming_loss, zero_one_loss, balanced_accuracy_score, matthews_corrcoef, cohen_kappa_score, jaccard_score, fbeta_score, brier_score_loss, hinge_loss, multilabel_confusion_matrix, precision_recall_fscore_support, classification_report, det_curve. All wired via lib.rs flat re-exports. Build clean.
